# Repository Index

Repo: `shaypal5.github.io`
Purpose: personal Jekyll site plus local Python automation for teaching-content sync/render/validation.

## Core Tree
- `_config.yml`: Jekyll config and deploy exclusions.
- `.github/`
  - `workflows/teaching-validation.yml`: CI producer, coverage artifacts, Jekyll build, PR agent context caller.
  - `workflows/pr-agent-context-refresh.yml`: append-mode refresh flow for later PR signals.
  - `pr-agent-context-template.md`: caller-side PR context template.
- `automation/`
  - `cli.py`: entrypoint for `courses backfill|sync|render|validate|plan`.
  - `config.py`: repo paths, markers, env contract, typed errors.
  - `google_drive.py`: OAuth refresh and Drive listing.
  - `naming.py`: folder/material inference heuristics.
  - `data_io.py`: YAML load/save.
  - `models.py`: course/material schemas.
  - `rendering.py`: deterministic markdown generation, including public material labels, course materials notes, and Talks/Blog/Code page rendering.
  - `repository.py`: repo render/write orchestration.
  - `validation.py`: schema/link/staleness validation for teaching and structured public pages.
  - `publish.py`: local git/PR publish helpers.
- `data/teaching/`
  - `courses.yml`: canonical course registry.
  - `materials/*.yml`: canonical per-course material lists.
- `data/talks.yml`: canonical Talks page front matter, selected links, anchors, and entries.
- `data/writing.yml`: canonical Blog page front matter, selected links, anchors, and entries.
- `data/projects.yml`: canonical Code page front matter, selected links, anchors, grouped sections, and entries.
- `teaching/`: generated course pages.
- `teaching.md`: teaching index with managed generated block.
- `talks.md`, `blog.md`, `code.md`: generated public pages rendered from `data/*.yml`.
- `tests/`
  - `test_naming.py`
  - `test_render_validate.py`
  - `test_validation.py`
- `docs/`
  - `project_overview.md`
  - `system_architecture.md`
  - `implementation_plan.md`
  - `data_model.md`
  - `operations.md`
  - `review_workflow.md`

## Schemas And Contracts
- Course schema: `automation/models.py`, `docs/data_model.md`, `data/teaching/courses.yml`
- Material schema: `automation/models.py`, `docs/data_model.md`, `data/teaching/materials/*.yml`
- Curation controls: material `public_title` preserves source `title` internally while curating public link text; course `manual_overrides.materials_note` renders reviewed context before materials lists.
- Managed-file markers: `automation/config.py`
- Public page data: `data/talks.yml`, `data/writing.yml`, `data/projects.yml`
- CLI contract: `automation/cli.py`
- Env vars: `automation/config.py`, `docs/operations.md`

## Internal APIs
- Render flow: `automation/repository.py` -> `automation/rendering.py`
- Validation flow: `automation/validation.py`
- Drive discovery flow: `automation/google_drive.py` + `automation/naming.py`
- Publish flow: `automation/publish.py`

## Commands
- Tests: `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests`
- Render: `python3 -m automation.cli courses render`
- Validate: `python3 -m automation.cli courses validate`
- Plan diff: `python3 -m automation.cli courses plan`
- Build: `RBENV_VERSION=3.3.0 bundle exec jekyll build`
